extensionDescription.message: Displays frequently used family contact names and short notes in large text. Memo display only; no calling or messaging.

appLead.message: Displays names and short notes for family contacts you use often in large, easy-to-read text. This extension does not call or send messages.

loadingBody.message: Checking the display list saved on this device.

onboardingGuide.message: Save one name first. It will appear here as a large card, and you can add a short note later.

emptyBody.message: There are no saved names yet. The first name you save will appear here as an easy-to-read card.

emptyNextStep.message: Use the input fields below to enter and save a name. The short note is optional.

editContactHint.message: Update the name and short note shown on the board.

addContactHint.message: Add a name and an optional short note to the board.

trialEnded.message: Trial ended. Basic display and editing still work.

premiumPrice.message: Premium is planned as a one-time $1 purchase.

premiumPlaceholder.message: The payment link is still being prepared.

loadError.message: Could not load data saved on this device.

loadErrorBody.message: Please close and reopen the popup.
